title: Fotolog and MySpace
body:
***Fotolog*** and ***MySpace*** are sites that we can put in the scope of the Social Networks of w*eb 2.0*.

The users of these sites usually have a different profile than those of us who use ***Flickr*** or have our own *blog* on ***WordPress***.

On ***YouTube*** we can see this video that shows this type of internet users quite a bit.

Although the creator of the video uses insults and disqualifications that I believe are unnecessary, it is worth watching, even if only in a humorous way.

[http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=qjV3NmbpGNo](http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=qjV3NmbpGNo)
